x.name: Deedy Das
x.bio: Partner @MenloVentures. Formerly founding team @glean, @google Search. @cornell CS. Investor @AnthropicAI, @GoodfireAI, @OpenRouter, @WisprFlow, @_inception_ai

tweets.text: You either exit a SaaS startup or live long enough to see yourself selling RL training data to AI labs

Legendary Don Knuth has now used AI to fully solve his Hamiltonian decomposition problem for odd and even cases.

Opus 4.6 / 5.4 Pro solved the even case, wrote a proof in Lean and a “apparently flawless 14 page paper”

Knuth: “We are living in very interesting times indeed.” https://t.co/erj7guVUEb
